title: Twilight · Chapter 12
description: 真人原声 · 第十二章

sentences.english: Stop!
sentences.shadowing: STOP! ↘

sentences.english: They were leaving. Then they heard us.
sentences.chinese: 他们正要离开后来听到了我们的动静
sentences.shadowing: They were leaving. THEN they HEARD us. ↘

sentences.english: - Let's go. - It's too late.
sentences.shadowing: - Let's go. - It's TOO LATE. ↘

sentences.english: Get your hair down.
sentences.shadowing: Get your HAIR DOWN. ↘

sentences.english: Like that'll help. I can smell her from across the field.
sentences.chinese: 那有用吗我在球场另一边都闻得到她的气味
sentences.shadowing: Like that'll help. I can smell her from‿ACROSS the FIELD. ↘

sentences.english: I shouldn't have brought you here. I'm so sorry.
sentences.chinese: 我不该带你到这来对不起
sentences.shadowing: I shouldn't have brought you here. I'M so SORRY. ↘

sentences.english: - What? What are you... - Just be quiet and stand behind me.
sentences.chinese: -怎么了你要－别出声站在我身后
sentences.shadowing: - What? What‿are you... - Just be quiet‿and STAND BEHIND me. ↘

sentences.english: I believe this belongs to you.
sentences.shadowing: I BELIEVE this BELONGS to you. ↘

sentences.english: Thank you.
sentences.shadowing: THANK you. ↘

sentences.english: I am Laurent.
sentences.shadowing: I am LAURENT. ↘

sentences.english: And this is Victoria
sentences.shadowing: And this‿is VICTORIA ↘

sentences.english: and James.
sentences.shadowing: and JAMES. ↘

sentences.english: I'm Carlisle. This is my family.
sentences.chinese: 我是卡莱尔这是我的家人
sentences.shadowing: I'm CARLISLE. This‿is my FAMILY. ↘

sentences.english: Hello.
sentences.shadowing: HELLO. ↘

sentences.english: I'm afraid your hunting activities have caused something of a mess for us.
sentences.chinese: 我担心你们的狩猎活动给我们造成了一点麻烦
sentences.shadowing: I'm‿afraid your hunting‿activities have caused SOMETHING of‿a MESS for‿us. ↘

sentences.english: Our apologies.
sentences.shadowing: Our‿APOLOGIES. ↘

sentences.english: We didn't realize the territory had been claimed.
sentences.chinese: 我不知道这片地方已经有主了
sentences.shadowing: We didn't realize the TERRITORY had been CLAIMED. ↘

sentences.english: Yes, well, we maintain a permanent residence nearby.
sentences.chinese: 我们在附近享有永久居留权
sentences.shadowing: Yes / well / we maintain‿a permanent RESIDENCE NEARBY. ↘

sentences.english: Really?
sentences.shadowing: REALLY? ↗

sentences.english: Well, we won't be a problem anymore.
sentences.shadowing: Well / we won't be a PROBLEM ANYMORE. ↘

sentences.english: We were just passing through.
sentences.shadowing: We were just PASSING THROUGH. ↘

sentences.english: The humans were tracking us, but we led them east.
sentences.chinese: 人类追踪我们但是我们把他们引到东面去了
sentences.shadowing: The humans were tracking‿us / but we led THEM EAST. ↘

sentences.english: You should be safe.
sentences.shadowing: You should be SAFE. ↘

sentences.english: Excellent.
sentences.shadowing: EXCELLENT. ↘

sentences.english: So,
sentences.shadowing: So, ↘

sentences.english: could you use three more players?
sentences.chinese: 你们要不要加三个选手
sentences.shadowing: could you use three MORE PLAYERS? ↗

sentences.english: Come on. Just one game.
sentences.shadowing: Come on. Just‿ONE GAME. ↘

sentences.english: Sure. Why not?
sentences.shadowing: Sure. WHY NOT? ↗

sentences.english: A few of us were leaving. You could take their place.
sentences.chinese: 有些人正要走你们可以替他们
sentences.shadowing: A few‿of‿us were leaving. You could TAKE their PLACE. ↘

sentences.english: We'll bat first.
sentences.shadowing: We'll BAT FIRST. ↘

sentences.english: I'm the one with the wicked curveball.
sentences.chinese: 我能投出漂亮的曲线球
sentences.shadowing: I'm the one with the WICKED CURVEBALL. ↘

sentences.english: Well, I think we can handle that.
sentences.shadowing: Well / I THINK we can HANDLE that. ↘

sentences.english: We shall see.
sentences.shadowing: We SHALL SEE. ↘

sentences.english: You brought a snack.
sentences.shadowing: You BROUGHT a SNACK. ↘

sentences.english: A human?
sentences.shadowing: A HUMAN? ↗

sentences.english: The girl is with us.
sentences.chinese: 这个女孩和我们一起的
sentences.shadowing: The GIRL is with‿us. ↘

sentences.english: I think it best if you leave.
sentences.shadowing: I think‿it BEST if you LEAVE. ↘

sentences.english: I can see the game is over.
sentences.shadowing: I can see the GAME is‿OVER. ↘

sentences.english: We'll go now.
sentences.shadowing: WE'LL go NOW. ↘

sentences.english: James.
sentences.shadowing: JAMES. ↘

sentences.english: Get Bella out of here.
sentences.shadowing: Get Bella OUT of HERE. ↘

sentences.english: Go.
sentences.shadowing: Go. ↘

sentences.english: Okay, I've got it! I've got it! I'm all right!
sentences.shadowing: Okay / I've got‿it! I've got‿it! I'm‿ALL RIGHT! ↘

sentences.english: What, now he's coming after me?
sentences.chinese: 怎么了他现在要追杀我
sentences.shadowing: What / now he's COMING AFTER me? ↗

sentences.english: Listen to me. James is a tracker. The hunt is his obsession.
sentences.chinese: 听我说詹姆斯是追踪猎手他最喜欢捕猎
sentences.shadowing: Listen to me. James‿is‿a tracker. The HUNT is his‿OBSESSION. ↘

sentences.english: I read his mind. My reaction on the field set him off.
sentences.chinese: 我读了他的想法我在球场上的反应刺激了他
sentences.shadowing: I read his mind. My reaction‿on the field set HIM OFF. ↘

sentences.english: I just made this his most exciting game ever.
sentences.chinese: 我令他觉得这是他生平最刺激的游戏
sentences.shadowing: I just made this his most‿exciting GAME EVER. ↘

sentences.english: - He's never gonna stop. - What should we do?
sentences.chinese: 他从不罢手－我们现在怎么办
sentences.shadowing: - He's never gonna STOP. - WHAT should we do? ↗

sentences.english: We have to kill him. Rip him apart and burn the pieces.
sentences.chinese: 我们只能杀了他把他撕碎烧成灰
sentences.shadowing: We have to kill him. Rip him‿apart‿and BURN the PIECES. ↘

sentences.english: - Where we going? - Away from Forks.
sentences.shadowing: - Where we going? - AWAY from FORKS. ↘

sentences.english: - We'll get a ferry to Vancouver. - I have to go home. Now.
sentences.chinese: - 我们坐渡轮去温哥华。 - 我现在必须回家。
sentences.shadowing: - We'll get‿a ferry to Vancouver. - I have to go HOME. NOW. ↘

sentences.english: - You have to take me home. - You can't go home.
sentences.shadowing: - You have to take me home. - You CAN'T go HOME. ↘

sentences.english: He's just gonna trace your scent there. It's the first place he's gonna look.
sentences.chinese: 他会追踪你的气味你家是他的第一目标
sentences.shadowing: He's just gonna trace your scent there. It's the first place he's GONNA LOOK. ↘

sentences.english: - But my dad is there. We... - It doesn't matter!
sentences.chinese: - 但我爸爸在那里，我们…… - 没关系！
sentences.shadowing: - But my dad‿is there. We... - It DOESN'T MATTER! ↘

sentences.english: Yes, it does! He could get killed because of us!
sentences.chinese: 有关系他会因为我们而被杀害
sentences.shadowing: Yes / it does! He could get KILLED BECAUSE of‿us! ↘

sentences.english: Just let me get you out of here first, all right?
sentences.chinese: 就让我带你先离开这好吗
sentences.shadowing: Just let me get you out‿of here first / ALL RIGHT? ↗

sentences.english: It's my dad! We have to go back!
sentences.chinese: 他是我爸爸我们要回去
sentences.shadowing: It's my DAD! We have to go BACK! ↘

sentences.english: We'll figure a way to lead the tracker away somehow.
sentences.chinese: 我们能想出办法把那追踪猎手引开
sentences.shadowing: We'll figure a way to lead the tracker‿AWAY SOMEHOW. ↘

sentences.english: I don't know. But we have to do something.
sentences.chinese: 我不知道怎样但是我们得想办法
sentences.shadowing: I don't KNOW. But we have to do SOMETHING. ↘

sentences.english: - Edward, I said leave me alone. - Bella, don't do this, please.
sentences.chinese: -爱德华我说过别理我－贝拉别这样
sentences.shadowing: - Edward / I said leave me alone. - Bella / DON'T do this / PLEASE. ↘

sentences.english: It's over! Get out!
sentences.shadowing: It's‿over! GET OUT! ↘

sentences.english: Hey, hey, hey, hey.
sentences.shadowing: Hey / hey / HEY / HEY. ↘

sentences.english: Bella? What's going on?
sentences.shadowing: Bella? WHAT'S GOING on? ↗

sentences.english: I just gotta get out of here. I'm leaving now.
sentences.chinese: 我要离开这里我要走了
sentences.shadowing: I just gotta get‿out‿of here. I'm LEAVING NOW. ↘

sentences.english: Hey.
sentences.shadowing: HEY. ↘

sentences.english: Bella?
sentences.shadowing: BELLA? ↗

sentences.english: What am I gonna say to him?
sentences.shadowing: What‿am‿I gonna SAY to HIM? ↗

sentences.english: I can't hurt him.
sentences.shadowing: I can't HURT HIM. ↘

sentences.english: - Bella, what's going on? - You just have to.
sentences.shadowing: - Bella / what's GOING on? - You JUST have to. ↘

sentences.english: I'll be down at the truck.
sentences.shadowing: I'll be DOWN at the TRUCK. ↘

sentences.english: Did he hurt you?
sentences.shadowing: Did he HURT you? ↗

sentences.english: No.
sentences.shadowing: No. ↘

sentences.english: Break up with you or something?
sentences.shadowing: BREAK up with you or SOMETHING? ↗

sentences.english: No, I broke up with him.
sentences.shadowing: No / I BROKE up with HIM. ↘

sentences.english: I thought you liked him.
sentences.shadowing: I thought you LIKED HIM. ↘

sentences.english: Yeah, that's why I have to leave.
sentences.shadowing: Yeah / that's WHY I have to LEAVE. ↘

sentences.english: I don't want this. I have to go home.
sentences.chinese: 我不想这样我要回家了
sentences.shadowing: I don't WANT this. I have to go HOME. ↘

sentences.english: Home? Your...
sentences.shadowing: HOME? Your... ↘

sentences.english: Your mom's not even in Phoenix.
sentences.shadowing: Your mom's not‿EVEN in PHOENIX. ↘

sentences.english: She'll come home. I'll call her from the road.
sentences.chinese: 她会回家的。我会在路上给她打电话。
sentences.shadowing: She'll come home. I'll CALL her from the ROAD. ↘

sentences.english: You're not gonna drive home right now.
sentences.chinese: 你不用马上就开车回家
sentences.shadowing: You're not gonna drive home RIGHT NOW. ↘

sentences.english: You can sleep on it. If you still feel like going in the morning.
sentences.chinese: 你先睡一觉早上你还想走的话
sentences.shadowing: You can sleep‿on‿it. If you still feel like GOING in the MORNING. ↘

sentences.english: - I'll take you to the airport. - No. I want to drive.
sentences.chinese: - 我会送你去机场。 - 不，我想开车。
sentences.shadowing: - I'll take you to the airport. - No. I WANT to DRIVE. ↘

sentences.english: It'll give me more time to think.
sentences.chinese: 那样我有更多时间思考
sentences.shadowing: It'll give me more TIME to THINK. ↘

sentences.english: I mean, if I get really tired, I'll pull into a motel. I promise.
sentences.chinese: 如果我累了我保证会去旅馆休息的
sentences.shadowing: I mean / if‿I get really tired / I'll pull‿into a MOTEL. I PROMISE. ↘

sentences.english: Look, Bella, I know I'm not that much fun to be around,
sentences.chinese: 听着贝拉我知道跟我一起住很无趣
sentences.shadowing: Look / Bella / I know‿I'm not that much FUN to be AROUND, ↘

sentences.english: but I can change that. We can do more stuff together.
sentences.chinese: 但是我能改我们可以一起做很多事
sentences.shadowing: but‿I can change that. We can do more STUFF TOGETHER. ↘

sentences.english: Like what?
sentences.shadowing: LIKE WHAT? ↗

sentences.english: Like watch baseball on the flat-screen?
sentences.shadowing: Like watch baseball‿on the FLAT-SCREEN? ↗

sentences.english: Eat at the diner every night? Steak and cobbler?
sentences.chinese: 每天晚上一起吃饭牛排和水果馅饼
sentences.shadowing: Eat‿at the diner‿every night? STEAK and COBBLER? ↗

sentences.english: Dad, that's you. That's not me.
sentences.shadowing: Dad / that's you. THAT'S NOT me. ↘

sentences.english: Bella, come on, I just...
sentences.shadowing: Bella / COME on / I JUST... ↘

sentences.english: I just got you back.
sentences.shadowing: I just GOT you BACK. ↘

sentences.english: Yeah, and, you know, if I don't get out now,
sentences.chinese: 对但你知道吗如果我现在不走
sentences.shadowing: Yeah / and / you know / if‿I don't get‿OUT NOW, ↘

sentences.english: then I'm just gonna be stuck here like Mom.
sentences.chinese: 我就会像妈妈一样困在这里
sentences.shadowing: then‿I'm just gonna be stuck here LIKE MOM. ↘

sentences.english: Your father's gonna forgive you.
sentences.shadowing: Your father's GONNA FORGIVE you. ↘

sentences.english: Why don't you let me drive?
sentences.shadowing: Why don't you LET me DRIVE? ↗

sentences.english: He won't.
sentences.shadowing: He WON'T. ↘

sentences.english: You should've seen his face.
sentences.shadowing: You should've SEEN his FACE. ↘

sentences.english: I told him the same thing that my mom told him
sentences.chinese: 我跟他说了我妈走的时候
sentences.shadowing: I told him the same thing that my mom TOLD HIM ↘

sentences.english: when she was leaving him.
sentences.shadowing: when she was LEAVING HIM. ↘

sentences.english: It's the only way he'd let you go.
sentences.chinese: 这是让他放你走的唯一办法
sentences.shadowing: It's the only way HE'D LET you go. ↘

sentences.english: Just don't worry about him now. He's safe. The tracker's following us.
sentences.chinese: 现在不用担心他了他很安全追踪猎手跟着我们
sentences.shadowing: Just don't worry‿about him now. He's safe. The TRACKER'S FOLLOWING us. ↘

sentences.english: - Oh, God. - It's just Emmett.
sentences.shadowing: - Oh / God. - It's JUST EMMETT. ↘

sentences.english: Alice is in the car behind us.
sentences.chinese: 爱丽丝的车就跟在我们后面
sentences.shadowing: Alice is‿in the CAR BEHIND us. ↘

sentences.english: Wait.
sentences.shadowing: WAIT. ↘

sentences.english: He came to warn us about James.
sentences.chinese: 他来警告我们詹姆斯的事。
sentences.shadowing: He came to warn‿us‿ABOUT JAMES. ↘

sentences.english: This isn't my fight, and I've grown tired of his games,
sentences.chinese: 这不是我要挑我已经厌倦了他的游戏
sentences.shadowing: This‿isn't my fight / and‿I've grown TIRED of his GAMES, ↘

sentences.english: but he's got unparalleled senses, absolutely lethal.
sentences.chinese: 但是他有超凡出众的能力绝对致命
sentences.shadowing: but he's got‿unparalleled senses / ABSOLUTELY LETHAL. ↘

sentences.english: I've never seen anything like him in my 300 years.
sentences.chinese: 300年来我从没见过像他那样的人
sentences.shadowing: I've never seen‿anything like HIM in my 300 YEARS. ↘

sentences.english: And the woman, Victoria, don't underestimate her.
sentences.chinese: 那个女人维多利亚不要低估她
sentences.shadowing: And the woman / Victoria / DON'T UNDERESTIMATE her. ↘

sentences.english: I've had to fight our kind before.
sentences.shadowing: I've had to fight‿our KIND BEFORE. ↘
